arts.ttl: Hoffenheim’s Tom Bischof and Bayer Leverkusen’s Francis Onyeka winners of the Fritz Walter Medal
arts.sum: The DFB have announced the winners and runners-up of the 2024 Fritz Walter medals in the under-19 and under-17 categories. The under-19 category was won by Hoffenheim’s Tom BIshcof. The…

arts.ttl: Hoffenheim vs. Bochum preview: Two teams desperate for maximum points
arts.sum: Hoffenheim and Bochum will both be desperate to claim maximum points when they face off in Saturday’s Bundesliga clash at PreZero Arena.

arts.ttl: Zeidler promises reward for Bochum's first win: "Three points, three cases of beer."
arts.sum: VfL Bochum trainer Peter Zeidler revealed that he opted to compromise his own principles for his team while speaking at his Thursday pre-match presser.
